title: Tel #8528
definition:
Tel-melah = "mound of salt"

 1) a place in Babylon from which some exiles of unknown parentage
    came; returned to Jerusalem with Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Tel-melah = "mound of salt"

 1) a place in Babylon from which some exiles of unknown parentage
    came; returned to Jerusalem with Zerubbabel

    NASB:  mound of salt, a place in Bab.
